creator: anesrm@gmail.com
text:
There are problem with security/sudo upgrade using package:

pkg_add sudo-1.7.4.2.tbz
Will not overwrite existing /usr/local/etc/sudoers file.
cp: /usr/local/etc/pam.d/sudo.default: No such file or directory
pkg_add: install script returned error status
error in dependency sudo-1.7.4.2.tbz, exiting

How-To-Repeat: Create package of security/sudo and try to install it with pkg_add.
